mapper.select:
SELECT cr.id, cr.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, cr.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, cr.correction_type, cr.source_type, cr.status, aul.model, aul.token_usage AS total_tokens, aul.credit_used, CASE WHEN cr.admin_memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.admin_memo) <> '' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_memo, cr.created_at FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id LEFT JOIN ai_usage_log aul ON aul.id = cr.ai_usage_log_id WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY cr.id DESC LIMIT #{criteria.size} OFFSET #{criteria.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id WHERE cr.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status != 'DELETED' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (cr.application_case_id IS NULL OR ac.deleted_at IS NULL)) AS total_requests, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id WHERE cr.status = 'SUCCESS' AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status != 'DELETED' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (cr.application_case_id IS NULL OR ac.deleted_at IS NULL)) AS success_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_usage_log aul JOIN users u ON u.id = aul.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = aul.application_case_id WHERE aul.status = 'FAILED' AND u.status != 'DELETED' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (aul.application_case_id IS NULL OR ac.deleted_at IS NULL) AND aul.feature_type IN ( 'CORRECTION_SELF_INTRO', 'CORRECTION_INTERVIEW_ANSWER', 'CORRECTION_RESUME', 'CORRECTION_PORTFOLIO' )) AS failure_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id WHERE cr.admin_memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.admin_memo) <> '' AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status != 'DELETED' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (cr.application_case_id IS NULL OR ac.deleted_at IS NULL)) AS memo_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id WHERE cr.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status != 'DELETED' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (cr.application_case_id IS NULL OR ac.deleted_at IS NULL)) AS today_count

SELECT cr.id, cr.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, cr.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, cr.correction_type, cr.source_type, cr.source_ref_id, cr.original_text, cr.improved_text, cr.result_json, cr.source_snapshot, cr.status, cr.ai_usage_log_id, aul.model, aul.input_tokens, aul.output_tokens, aul.token_usage AS total_tokens, aul.credit_used, cr.admin_memo, cr.created_at FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id LEFT JOIN ai_usage_log aul ON aul.id = cr.ai_usage_log_id WHERE cr.id = #{id} AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status != 'DELETED' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (cr.application_case_id IS NULL OR ac.deleted_at IS NULL)

SELECT cr.id, cr.user_id, cr.admin_memo FROM correction_request cr JOIN users u ON u.id = cr.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = cr.application_case_id WHERE cr.id = #{id} AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status != 'DELETED' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (cr.application_case_id IS NULL OR ac.deleted_at IS NULL) FOR UPDATE

SELECT aul.id, aul.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, aul.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, aul.feature_type, aul.model, aul.input_tokens, aul.output_tokens, aul.token_usage AS total_tokens, aul.error_message, aul.created_at FROM ai_usage_log aul JOIN users u ON u.id = aul.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = aul.application_case_id WHERE aul.status = 'FAILED' AND u.status != 'DELETED' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (aul.application_case_id IS NULL OR ac.deleted_at IS NULL) AND aul.feature_type IN ( 'CORRECTION_SELF_INTRO', 'CORRECTION_INTERVIEW_ANSWER', 'CORRECTION_RESUME', 'CORRECTION_PORTFOLIO' ) ORDER BY aul.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE correction_request SET admin_memo = #{adminMemo} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users active_user WHERE active_user.id = correction_request.user_id AND active_user.status != 'DELETED' AND active_user.deleted_at IS NULL ) AND ( application_case_id IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM application_case active_case WHERE active_case.id = correction_request.application_case_id AND active_case.deleted_at IS NULL ) )
